name: Молотобойцы Первой Штольни
notes: The Hammermen of the First Adit: sixteen dwarf extras of the Kragmir arena playing 'the mine waking up' in the Defense of the First Adit. They rise from the lift plates on the second gong, form a wall of sledgehammers and mining lamps, and grind forward. A single Gargantuan troop actor. Thresholds: at 48 HP it drops to 12 squares, at 24 HP to 8 squares, at 0 it disperses. Weak to area and splash damage.

actions.name: Hammer Wall
actions.text:
1 to 3

Frequency once per round

Effect The hammermen swing as one line against each adjacent enemy, with a @Check[type:reflex|dc:20|basic:true] save. The damage depends on the number of actions.

1 @Damage[(1d10)[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] damage

2 @Damage[(1d10+7)[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] damage

3 @Damage[(1d10+10)[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] damage

actions.name: Heave!
actions.text:
The line lowers shoulders and shoves. Each adjacent enemy attempts a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:20] save.

Success The creature holds its ground.

Failure The creature is pushed 5 feet directly away from the troop.

Critical Failure The creature is pushed 10 feet directly away and knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Prone] (вручную: передвинуть токены).

actions.name: Troop Movement
actions.text: Whenever the hammermen Stride, they first Form Up as a free action to condense into a 20-foot-by-20-foot area (minus any missing squares), then move up to their Speed. This works just like a Gargantuan creature moving. The hammermen ignore difficult terrain caused by rubble and loose stone chips (but not greater difficult terrain).
